title: Nursery Rhyme. CXVI. Scholastic.
content:
Multiplication is vexation,
            Division is as bad;
        The Rule of Three doth puzzle me,
            And Practice drives me mad.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CXVI. Scholastic."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
